text: Standing before this vibrant wall, I’m enveloped in a sense of curiosity mixed with self-awareness. The blend of bold text and screens invites me to engage, while the careful curation of objects and words hints at deeper questions about seeing, hiding, and revealing. The artificial light and neat order impress upon me a sense of being part of someone else's experiment—a living inquiry into what it means to observe and be observed. It is both thrilling and slightly uneasy, as if I am participating in a dialogue with the space itself.
